name: eslint-plugin-bedrock
description: ESLint rules for the bedrock kit — mechanical enforcement for the patterns the PreToolUse hook can't catch (existing code, refactors, cross-file). Catches: deep slice imports past index.ts; @x outside entities; primitive-token references in components; entity queries.ts missing import 'server-only'; 'use client' at a page top; event emitters built outside shared/lib/events.
